reviews.comment:
no te dejan estacionar ni aunque llegues con una rueda en llantas. no se puede llamar "estacion de servicio" solo quieren verderte el combustible

(Translated by Google)
They won't let you park, even if you arrive with one wheel on the rim. It can't be called a "service station." They just want to sell you fuel.
